Sergio, I have read your report, and I have two concerns. The counterparty has breached the limit twice, and the buffer looks thin.
Thank you, Claudia. You are right. We have already reduced the position, and we have added a hedge this week.
Good. But you have not escalated it to the board. Why not?
We have not escalated it yet because the exposure has fallen below the threshold since Monday.
I see. So what do you recommend for the committee?
I recommend that we raise the buffer and flag the counterparty to the regulator today.
I have reviewed the exposure, and the counterparty has breached the limit.

I recommend that we raise the buffer and flag the counterparty.

Hello, everyone, and thank you for your reports this week. I have reviewed all the risk desks, and I have a few short messages. The market team has closed two positions, and the credit desk has raised its buffer. We have not resolved the counterparty issue yet, so it stays open for next week. Overall, the desks have managed the exposure well, and the regulator has not raised any new concerns. Please send your updated action plans before Friday. Thank you.

Hi Sergio, it is Paulo from the credit desk. A quick update before the committee. I have finished the review of the counterparty, and the numbers have improved since Monday. We have added the hedge, and the exposure has fallen below the threshold. I have not sent the final figures yet, but I will do it this afternoon. Can we agree on the recommendation before the meeting? I think we have done enough to keep the position open. Thanks.

The counterparty has breached the limit twice this week. The team has reviewed the exposure and reduced the position. We have added a hedge, and the exposure has fallen below the threshold. We have not escalated it to the board yet. In the committee, Sergio has recommended a higher buffer and flagged the counterparty to the regulator.
